Tang Pu е”җиӯң
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tang Pu (е”җиӯң). Conspired with LГј Xing against Wu. Tang Pu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
